ref: A woman whose daughter had an evil spirit in her heard where Jesus was. And at once she came and knelt down at his feet.
text: A daadaalɛ, pɔge kaŋ pɔg-yalee naŋ da taa sefaa da woŋ la O yɛlɛ, a da wa le gbi dumo O niŋesogɔŋ.
translated: If you try, a woman who is not beautiful today may become beautiful tomorrow, so do not despise her.
